petContext.label: Pet Context
petContext.description: Loads Pet state from DB, detects trigger type, and routes to the correct downstream branch

descriptions.petUserIdDesc: User ID identifying which Pet to load. Auto-resolved from overrideConfig.petUserId.

outputs.teach: Teaching command detected (e.g. 跟我读 / 教你做)
outputs.egg: Egg stage — no LLM, primitive sound only
outputs.babble: Babble stage — card recall, no LLM
outputs.llm: Echo / Talk stage — LLM with few-shot & memory

petCardRecaller.label: Pet Card Recaller
petCardRecaller.description: Embeds user input and recalls matching Cards (vocab/phrase/action). Babble branch: sets petResponse. LLM/Agent branches: sets queryEmbedding + fewShotMatches + recentVocab.

petMemoryRetriever.label: Pet Memory Retriever
petMemoryRetriever.description: Retrieves relevant PetMemory records via cosine similarity, then builds the complete system prompt (stage + memory + few-shot examples) for the downstream LLM / Agent node.

petCardSaver.label: Pet Card Saver
petCardSaver.description: Terminal node for the teach branch. Saves the parsedTeach card directly to the DB and returns a confirmation message — no HTTP request needed.

descriptions.petCardEmbeddingModelDesc: Recommended — generates a vector for the card input so PetCardRecaller can match it by similarity. Falls back to text-overlap matching if omitted.

petStateUpdater.label: Pet State Updater
petStateUpdater.description: Terminal node for LLM/Agent branches. Saves PetChatMessages, triggers personality drift and optional memory consolidation (all fire-and-forget), then streams the reply.

descriptions.petStateUpdaterReplyDesc: Connect to the LLM or Agent node output that produced the pet reply
descriptions.petChatModelDesc: Required for personality drift. Connect the same model used in the LLM/Agent node.
